name: KATSEYE
description: KATSEYE is the global girl group formed by HYBE and Geffen Records through the Dream Academy survival series, featuring six members from across the world.

funFacts: From the Philippines — strong Filipino fandom backbone
Took the leader role on Dream Academy
Known for her composed stage presence
members.bio: Sophia is KATSEYE's Filipino leader from Dream Academy. She anchors the group's energy with calm leadership and strong vocals, bridging the global fandom.

popularSongs.title: Debut Single
popularSongs.note: Group debut where Sophia's calm vocal anchors the verses.

popularSongs.title: Touch
popularSongs.note: Pre-debut release that introduced Sophia as the group's vocal grounding point.

popularSongs.title: Gnarly
popularSongs.note: Title where Sophia's leader presence frames the chorus formation.

members.distinction: Unlike other KATSEYE members, Sophia anchors the group as the Filipino-born leader — her composed stage presence reads as steady-hand vocal direction rather than spotlight grabbing, which is why her parts often function as the song's emotional baseline.
members.fandomChant: EYEKONS chant 'Sophia Laforteza!' through her solo lines and switch to Tagalog 'mahal kita' calls on Manila stops.

funFacts: Trained in classical and contemporary vocal styles
members.bio: Lara brings vocal range and emotional depth to KATSEYE, with Indian-American heritage. Her belting moments often go viral on TikTok.

popularSongs.title: Debut Single
popularSongs.note: Group debut where Lara's belt sequence broke through algorithm-wide on short-form.

popularSongs.title: Touch
popularSongs.note: Pre-debut release where Lara's hook delivery established her main-vocal role.

popularSongs.title: Gnarly
popularSongs.note: Title where Lara's bridge belt anchors the climax.

members.distinction: Unlike other KATSEYE members, Lara leans into main-vocal belt sequences trained in both Indian classical and contemporary technique — her runs read as technically dense rather than purely emotional, which is why her short-form clips travel through vocal-coach reaction accounts.
members.fandomChant: EYEKONS chant 'Lara Raj!' through her belt moments and keep silent during her high-note holds to preserve the live recording.

funFacts: Brings a chic European style to the group
members.bio: Manon is KATSEYE's multilingual member with Swiss-Ghanaian roots. Her chic European style and dry humor have built a strong European fanbase.

popularSongs.title: Debut Single
popularSongs.note: Group debut where Manon's rap section gives the song its tempo lift.

popularSongs.title: Touch
popularSongs.note: Pre-debut release where Manon's bilingual ad-libs frame the chorus.

popularSongs.title: Gnarly
popularSongs.note: Title where Manon's rap break drives the choreography pivot.

members.distinction: Unlike other KATSEYE members, Manon brings Swiss-Ghanaian heritage and multilingual rap delivery — her bars carry European phrasing rhythms not typical to K-pop, which is why her parts tend to over-index in European charting markets.
members.fandomChant: EYEKONS chant 'Manon Bannerman!' through her rap section and tend to throw heart-finger signs during her French ad-libs on tour.

funFacts: From Hawaii, USA — Thai and Chinese descent
Loves choreography videos and dance challenges
members.bio: Megan is KATSEYE's main dancer from Hawaii. Her technical precision and explosive stage charisma anchor the group's choreography.

popularSongs.title: Debut Single
popularSongs.note: Group debut where Megan's dance break became the most-clipped moment.

popularSongs.title: Touch
popularSongs.note: Pre-debut release where Megan's main-dancer position frames the choreography.

popularSongs.title: Gnarly
popularSongs.note: Title where Megan's choreography break carries the song's identity.

members.distinction: Unlike other KATSEYE members, Megan executes main-dancer center duties with explicitly technical timing — her Thai-Chinese-Hawaiian background reads as crisp counts and fully extended lines, which is why her dance practice clips outperform some title-track MVs.
members.fandomChant: EYEKONS chant 'Megan Skiendiel!' through her dance breaks and tend to clap on her count drops live.

members.bio: Daniela brings Latin American flair to KATSEYE. Her bilingual charm and dance training have built a passionate Latin fandom presence.

popularSongs.title: Debut Single
popularSongs.note: Group debut where Daniela's hook section pulled Latin chart attention.

popularSongs.title: Touch
popularSongs.note: Pre-debut release where Daniela's Spanish ad-libs anchor the bridge.

popularSongs.title: Gnarly
popularSongs.note: Title where Daniela's visual frame carries the chorus camera holds.

members.distinction: Unlike other KATSEYE members, Daniela channels Cuban-Venezuelan dance vocabulary into K-pop choreography — her hip motion translates as warmth rather than aggression, which is why her parts route fan interest from Latin America back to the group page.
members.fandomChant: EYEKONS chant 'Daniela Avanzini!' through her dance breaks and switch to Spanish 'mi reina' calls on Latin American tour stops.

funFacts: Trained at HYBE before joining Dream Academy
Bridges Korean K-Pop industry knowledge to the global group
members.bio: Yoonchae is KATSEYE's Korean maknae and the group's bridge to traditional K-Pop. Her training inside HYBE gives her industry savviness.

popularSongs.title: Debut Single
popularSongs.note: Group debut where Yoonchae's Korean ad-libs anchor the K-pop frame.

popularSongs.title: Touch
popularSongs.note: Pre-debut release where Yoonchae's vocal tone bridges the global lineup.

popularSongs.title: Gnarly
popularSongs.note: Title where Yoonchae's maknae center moments carry the camera holds.

members.distinction: Unlike other KATSEYE members, Yoonchae brings inside-HYBE K-pop training as the only Korean member — her Korean delivery anchors the group's Korean-language verses, which is why her parts function as the group's K-pop bona fides.
members.fandomChant: EYEKONS chant 'Jeung Yoonchae!' through her solo lines and tend to switch to 'maknae jjang' calls during her variety-show moments.

seo.title: KATSEYE Name Generator | Get Your Korean Name with the EYEKONS Global Girls
seo.description: Create your KATSEYE Korean name with Sophia, Lara, Manon, Megan, Daniela & Yoonchae! Instant chemistry scores for HYBE x Geffen's global girl group. Perfect for EYEKONS fanfiction.
